name: Cappuccino Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Unsweetened cocoa powder plus more for garnish
1/2 cup Frozen nonfat egg substitute; thaw, equivalent to 2 eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Stir together wafer crumbs and cinnamon.
3. Pat mixture into bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
4. Beat cream cheese until light and fluffy.
5. Beat in sugar and cocoa powder.
6. Beat in egg substitute.
7. Stir in sour cream substitute, coffee liqueur, and vanilla.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake for about 30 minutes, or until set.
10. Spread remaining sour cream substitute evenly over top.
11. Return to oven for 1 minute to glaze the top.
12. Cool to room temperature, then chill thoroughly, covered.
13. Remove from springform pan.
14. Just before serving, dust top with cocoa powder in a decorative pattern, if desired.
